overall.description: A gameplay clip from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through a dark, neon-lit underground parking garage, entering a blue pickup truck, and driving through the industrial space. The footage transitions from third-person exploration to first-person vehicle operation, showcasing detailed cyberpunk environments with cyan and orange neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground parking garage with industrial elements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit garage, approaching a blue pickup truck parked ahead

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete support pillar with metal reinforcements
dark colored sedan parked against the left wall
glowing yellow and cyan neon signs in the distance
small vendor stall covered with green tarpaulin and wooden crates
light blue compact pickup truck with visible front grille

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, industrial underground parking garage illuminated by cyan and yellow neon lights. The camera moves forward through the concrete space, passing industrial pillars and parked vehicles, steadily approaching a blue pickup truck in the center area.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle entry zone in underground garage

events.description: character stops walking and begins interaction with the blue pickup truck door
perspective shifts from third-person exterior to first-person interior view inside the vehicle cabin

agents.ego_description: opening the driver's side door of the blue pickup truck and settling into the driver's seat

entered.detail: interior cabin of the pickup truck with worn fabric seats and door panels
black steering wheel with metallic accents and control buttons
vehicle dashboard with illuminated gauges and central console
interior rearview mirror reflecting the garage behind

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the blue pickup truck and opens the driver's side door. The perspective transitions from third-person to first-person as the character enters the vehicle and settles into the driver's seat, with the interior dashboard, steering wheel, and rearview mirror becoming visible while the exterior garage elements fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: driving lane in multi-level parking structure

events.description: vehicle engine starts and begins moving forward through the garage
approaching a large illuminated wall mural featuring samurai artwork

agents.ego_description: driving the pickup truck through the underground garage, navigating between concrete pillars and parked vehicles

entered.detail: yellow sports car parked on the left side of the driving lane
derelict vehicle with rusted body and flat tires
large wall painting depicting a samurai figure with red and cyan neon lighting above
stacked industrial barrels and crates along the right wall
structural concrete archway supporting the upper levels

segments.scene_description: From the first-person driver's perspective, the truck accelerates through the dimly lit garage, passing various parked vehicles including a yellow sports car and rusted abandoned vehicles. The vehicle approaches a large, illuminated samurai mural on the far wall, navigating between concrete pillars and industrial storage elements as it moves deeper into the parking structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous movement through a dark industrial garage that transitions from a pedestrian exploration into a first-person drive. It begins by gliding through a concrete parking space illuminated by cyan and yellow neon lights, passing industrial pillars and parked cars while steadily approaching a blue pickup truck. As the character reaches the vehicle and opens the door, the perspective shifts seamlessly from third-person to first-person, settling into the driver's seat where the dashboard and steering wheel come into focus. The scene then expands as the truck accelerates forward, weaving past a yellow sports car and rusted wreckage. Finally, the vehicle navigates between concrete pillars and industrial storage elements, heading deeper into the structure toward a large, illuminated samurai mural on the far wall.
